summary: Verified 5 bug fixes for Trend Syria seller registration: 1) Sham Cash accepts 32 hex chars, 2) Commitment checkbox red→green, 3) Bottom nav hidden on registration pages, 4) No unnecessary GPS notification, 5) GPS button inside map. All 8 backend tests passed, UI verification completed.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Fix #1 - Sham Cash 32 hex chars: Verified in SellerPages.js (lines 628-642), WithdrawModal.js (lines 81-87), JoinAsFoodSellerPage.js (lines 1126-1133)
✅ Fix #2 - Commitment checkbox red/green: Verified in SellerPages.js (lines 480-504) - starts red, turns green on check
✅ Fix #3 - Bottom nav hidden: Verified in useNavConfig.js (lines 123-131) - hidden on /register, /seller/documents, /seller/pending, /join/*
✅ Fix #4 - No GPS notification: Verified in FullScreenMapPicker.js (line 161) - comment confirms toast removed
✅ Fix #5 - GPS button inside map: Verified in FullScreenMapPicker.js (lines 286-287) - positioned at bottom-40 right-3 with data-testid='gps-location-btn'
